payload.description: Wire Irrig8 sensor ingest pipeline. Implement TCO action handler 'ingest_sensor_reading' in inference_node.py. Handler should validate a SoilSample, write to tenants/irrig8/sensor_data/<hub_id>/<timestamp>.json, and trigger a Worksheet regeneration via WorksheetServer.
constraints: worksheet OTA must be triggered atomically

constraints: worksheet OTA must be triggered atomically
